schema_id.description: Unique identifier for this schema document

description.description: Detailed description of what this metric measures

metric_type.description: Categorisation of how the metric is computed and interpreted

weight.description: Relative weight of this metric when aggregating scores

higher_is_better.description: Indicates whether a higher numeric score represents a better outcome

target_value.description: The ideal or target value the metric should reach

minimum_value.description: Minimum possible value for this metric

maximum_value.description: Maximum possible value for this metric

aggregation.description: Method used to aggregate individual scores into a single metric value

tags.description: Arbitrary tags for categorisation and filtering

warnings.description: Non-fatal issues detected during metric definition

errors.description: Fatal issues detected during metric definition
